name: MT RUSHMORE KOA RESORT & LODGE AT PALMER GULCH ~

violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — ---Cup in wine mix without handle. (staff changed to one with handle)--Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloth found on counter.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Wet cloths found on countertops not stored in saniti bucket.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Equipment/utensil was not air-dried or allowed adequate draining after sanitizing. - Items found drying on cloth.--Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. - Staff not using 3 step method of washing, rinsing and sanitizing. 3rd sink covered by clean dishes.
